name: boot-hoist-guards
notes: Detects file-scope `class_exists($name, false)` guards preceding a same-file top-level class declaration. PHP class hoisting makes such guards always trigger, aborting the file before any add_action() past the guard registers. Surfaced 2026-05-27 after wb-gamification.php#L222 silently broke the admin menu for ~9 hours. Enforced by bin/check-boot-invariants.php (wired into local-ci 2.13).
